narrative:
Batavia Township J (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,068 registered voters, with 61.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points.
